creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
On Wed, 19 Dec 2001, Joseph Scott wrote:
 
 >  2. The PREFIX fix that I've included is rather brute force'ish, but
 >     it appears to be the only way to get perl modules to respect PREFIX
 >     correctly.  If you know of a better way to do this (I hope someone does)
 >     then please let me know.
 
 I think all we need to do is have PREFIX=${PREFIX} or similar appended to
 the perl Makefile.PL command. I'll do some experimenting and see if I can
 work out how that fits with the port makefile (unless you want to try).
 
 Andrew
